title: hieracium vulgatum subsp. phrixophyton
intro: Hieracium vulgatum subsp. phrixophyton, also known as the hawkweed, is a plant species within the dandelion-like Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Hieracium vulgatum subsp. phrixophyton can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be carefully monitored due to potential toxicity and side effects.
